linkedin_connect.default: Hey [FIRST_NAME] — saw [COMPANY] is scaling fast right now. I run Rylem Staffing, been placing IT and engineering talent for 18 years. Would love to connect.

by_lead.coreweave: Hey [FIRST_NAME] — congrats on the IPO run-up. The engineering hiring pace at CoreWeave is something else. I place senior infrastructure and ML engineers nationally. Would love to be in your network.
by_lead.temporal: Hey [FIRST_NAME] — $300M Series D is a serious signal. Engineering teams at that growth stage usually need contractors fast. I place senior engineers nationally at Rylem. Worth connecting.
by_lead.xbow: Hey [FIRST_NAME] — $120M Series C in March is a massive signal. Teams at that inflection point hire fast. I run Rylem Staffing, we place senior engineers and security talent. Would love to connect.
by_lead.menlosecurity: Hey [FIRST_NAME] — Menlo's been on our radar. Zero-trust security is one of the hottest hiring categories right now. I run Rylem Staffing, been placing IT and security talent for 18 years. Worth connecting.

default.subject: Quick intro — Rylem Staffing
default.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Followed up on LinkedIn — wanted to reach out directly too.

Rylem is a diversity-certified staffing firm. We place IT, engineering, finance, and ops professionals nationwide. 18 years, 100K+ candidates in our database.

We move faster than most — typical time-to-submit is under 48 hours for senior roles.

Worth a 15-minute call to see if there's a fit?

Mike Dades
CEO, Rylem Staffing
miked@rylem.com

default.script:
OPENING:
"Hi [FIRST_NAME], this is Mike Dades from Rylem Staffing — did I catch you at a bad time?"

IF YES: "No problem — when's a better time? I'll send a calendar invite."

IF NO (2-3 minutes):
"Great. I'll be quick. Rylem is a diversity-certified staffing firm — we place IT, engineering, and finance talent nationally. 18 years in the business, we have 100K candidates in our database.

I noticed [COMPANY] has been scaling fast / posted [X] roles recently / raised recently — I wanted to ask: are you the right person to talk to about contract or direct-hire needs, or should I be talking to someone else?"

OBJECTION — 'We use a VMS/MSP':
"Totally understand. Do you have a preferred suppliers list or a supplier diversity program? Rylem is certified — we qualify for a lot of those programs."

CLOSE:
"Can I send you a quick intro email and schedule 15 minutes?"
